description_long: This is a diamond-shaped road work warning sign with a bright orange face bordered by a thin black outline, mounted on a tall, slender black post. The sign displays the words 'ROAD WORK AHEAD' in bold, black, all-capital letters, making it highly visible to approaching drivers. The sign's face is flat and smooth, with no additional symbols or arrows, and the post appears to be made of metal, providing stability and durability. The rear of the sign is plain orange, lacking any text or markings. The post is cylindrical and extends well below the sign, suggesting it is designed to be embedded into the ground or a base for temporary or semi-permanent installation. The overall construction is typical for roadside warning signs used in urban and suburban environments.
description: A bright orange diamond-shaped 'ROAD WORK AHEAD' sign with bold black text, mounted on a tall black metal post. The sign is highly visible and designed for roadside placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange diamond sign with 'ROAD WORK AHEAD' text clearly visible and the full length of the black post.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and post, with the sign face barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain orange back of the sign and the supporting post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the sign and post.
